name: tolaria-setup
description: Tolaria's agent-native engineering setup as a profile: direct-to-main TDD with a two-tier husky gate (lint pre-commit; build+coverage+smoke+CodeScene pre-push), ratcheted CodeScene thresholds, Codacy/Semgrep scans, an ADR system with /create-adr, Chunk sidecar lanes, and Todoist task-loop commands. Extracted from github.com/refactoringhq/tolaria.

prompts.name: todoist_rework_section
prompts.message: Todoist section ID: To Rework (failed QA)

onboarding: READ FIRST — what this profile is, and what it costs. It installs the engineering *setup* (contract, docs, two-tier git gates, scanners), not an application. Until this repo has a `package.json` (frontend) or `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` (Rust), the `pre-commit` and `pre-push` hooks detect there is no app and self-skip — so your first commit and push are instant and need no toolchain. Once the app exists, `pre-push` deliberately *replaces CI*: budget ~1 min frontend-only, ~2-3 min with incremental Rust, and ~8-10 min when the Rust coverage build is cold or `LAPUTA_FULL_COVERAGE=1` is set. Do not skip it with `--no-verify`.

Expect slow one-time toolchain installs — and don't pay them twice. The Rust coverage gate shells out to `cargo llvm-cov`, which needs `cargo-llvm-cov`: installing it via `cargo install` compiles it from source (minutes), so prefer a prebuilt binary (`cargo binstall cargo-llvm-cov --locked`). The CodeScene MCP install (`brew install cs-mcp`) may also build from source, and the Playwright lane downloads browser bundles. If you enable the Chunk sidecars, `.chunk/config.json` bootstraps rustup + `cargo install cargo-llvm-cov --locked` on every fresh environment — follow `.chunk/README.md` and snapshot the sidecar once it passes, or that toolchain recompiles on every run. Set `LAPUTA_PREPUSH_LOCAL=1` to bypass the sidecar and gate locally.

Wire the scripts the hooks call: `package.json` needs `lint`, `test`, `test:coverage`, and `playwright:smoke` (see `.github/HOOKS.md`), plus `pnpm add -D husky` and a `"prepare": "husky"` script so `.husky/` activates on install.

Playwright smoke lane: this profile ships `playwright.smoke.config.ts` and `scripts/playwright-smoke-server.mjs` — the config and dev-server that the pre-push hook and `.chunk/run-playwright-*.sh` runners require. You must still (a) `pnpm add -D @playwright/test`, (b) set `playwright:smoke` to start with the EXACT prefix `playwright test --config playwright.smoke.config.ts ` followed by your spec paths (the Chunk runner throws on any other format), and (c) write specs tagged `@smoke` into `tests/smoke/<slug>.spec.ts` per AGENTS.md. The server assumes a Vite `pnpm dev` app — adjust the spawn command if your stack differs. Until specs exist the gate is a safe no-op.

CodeScene: create the project, then wire the MCP — install the server (`brew tap codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server && brew install cs-mcp`) and export `CS_ACCESS_TOKEN` (PAT from codescene.io/users/me/pat); the shipped `.mcp.json` registers it and `.claude/settings.local.json` pre-approves it, so `mcp__codescene__*` tools work on the next session. Also set `CODESCENE_PAT` + `CODESCENE_PROJECT_ID` locally and `CODESCENE_TOKEN`/`CODESCENE_PROJECT_ID` as CI secrets for the API/threshold path. `.codescene-thresholds` starts at 8.0 — a ratchet, up only.
Codacy: enable the repo and install the CLI wrapper (`.codacy/cli.sh`) or MCP, per AGENTS.md's security-scan section.

Review AGENTS.md section 2 (Product Rules) and the QA-scripts reference: they carry Tolaria's product specifics (demo-vault hygiene, shadcn/ui table, WKWebView notes, `~/.openclaw/skills/tolaria-qa` scripts) — adapt or prune them for this project.
Copy `.env.example` to `.env.local` and fill what applies (Sentry, PostHog, Lara i18n); mirror release values into GitHub Actions secrets.
If you enabled the Todoist loop: export `TODOIST_API_KEY` and verify the four section IDs baked into `.claude/commands/laputa-*.md`.
Chunk sidecars are optional: without the `chunk` CLI the pre-push hook runs everything locally; see `.chunk/README.md` to enable the fast remote lanes.
session_start: hp="$(git config core.hooksPath 2>/dev/null)"; [ ! -d .husky ] || [ "$hp" = ".husky" ] || [ "$hp" = ".husky/_" ] || echo 'WARNING tolaria-setup: git hooks are NOT armed - the pre-commit/pre-push gates described in AGENTS.md will not run. Wire them now: pnpm add -D husky; add a prepare=husky script to package.json; pnpm install.'
